name: Crumble Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, granulated sugar, and salt together in a large bowl.
2. Add egg, milk, and vegetable oil to the dry ingredients. Mix well until just combined.
3. Pour batter into an ungreased round glass cake pan.
4. In another bowl, mix brown sugar, flour, and cinnamon for the topping.
5. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the batter.
6. Drizzle melted butter (or margarine) over the top of the cake.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at high temperature for 7-8 minutes.
8. Turn off the oven and give the dish a quarter turn every two minutes.
9. The cake is done when a toothpick inserted into the center comes out almost clean.
10. Serve 8 portions.
